headline: Netflix tries to recapture Stranger Things magic with nostalgic re-release
summary: Netflix re-released the first season of 'Stranger Things' on its 10th anniversary. This new version aims to recreate the original VHS viewing experience. It's part of Netflix's ongoing effort to expand the 'Stranger Things' universe.

headline: Samsung shows off ‘brand new shape’ for Z Fold 8 in Spider-Man teaser
summary: Samsung teased a new shape for its upcoming Galaxy Z Fold 8 smartphone. The reveal was hidden within a teaser for 'Spider-Man: Brand New Day'. Shots of the foldable phone were heavily obscured by lens flares.

headline: OpenAI finally launches hardware… for Codex
summary: OpenAI has released its first hardware product, named Codex Micro. It's a square-shaped device designed to be used with their coding platform, Codex. This is not the mysterious AI device being developed with Jony Ive.

headline: Daylight saving time is a step closer to becoming permanent in the US
summary: The US House advanced the Sunshine Protection Act, moving closer to year-round daylight saving time. The bill passed with a 308 to 117 vote. If enacted, clocks would permanently move one hour ahead.

headline: Amazon's Audible Prime Day Deal Ends Today: Pay Just $1 Per Month and Get $20 in Audible Credit
summary: Audible's Prime Day deal offers membership for just $1 per month. Subscribers also receive a $20 Audible credit. This limited-time offer ends today.

headline: GTA 6's Lack of a PC Port Isn't Out of Greed, According to a Former Rockstar Producer
summary: A former Rockstar Games producer explained why GTA 6 won't launch on PC initially. He stated the delay is not due to greed. Rockstar typically prioritizes console releases before PC ports.

headline: Pick Up a Powerful and Infinitely Reusable Cordless Electric Air Duster for $19 After Coupon
summary: Get a cordless electric air duster for $19 with a coupon. The duster is reusable and powerful for cleaning electronics. It's ideal for maintaining dusty PCs and other gadgets.

headline: The FlashForge AD5X Multi-Color Mixed Material 3D Printer Drops to $215 Shipped at AliExpress
summary: The FlashForge AD5X 3D printer is available for $215 on AliExpress. This multi-color, mixed-material 3D printer offers significant savings. It's a notable discount from its Amazon price of $350.

headline: Starmer says it's the 'end of my political journey' at his final Prime Minister's Questions
summary: Sir Keir Starmer marked his final appearance at Prime Minister's Questions. He stated it was the 'end of his political journey' as PM. MPs from across the House paid tribute and shared anecdotes.

headline: Watch: Starmer's kind send-off across the Commons
summary: Sir Keir Starmer received a warm send-off during his final PMQs. The atmosphere was notably less confrontational than usual. The video captures the tributes from across the Commons.

headline: Man arrested over social media post threatening to shoot Farage
summary: A man in his 20s was arrested in London. He is suspected of sending threatening communications to an MP via social media. The threat reportedly targeted Nigel Farage.

headline: Iran threatens to block more trade routes as US launches fresh strikes
summary: Iran has threatened to block additional trade routes. This comes in response to new US military strikes. President Trump vowed further strikes if Iran doesn't resume talks.
